name: Dumbbell Shrug
resistance_profile: Load is constant but the traps are weakest at the top squeeze, so the fully shortened position is the sticking point; lower to a full stretch each rep.
cues: Shrug straight up, pause at the top
execution_steps: Hold a dumbbell in each hand at your sides, arms straight, standing tall.
Brace your core and keep shoulders relaxed down to start.
Shrug the shoulders straight up toward your ears and pause at the top.
Lower fully to a stretch under control, without rolling the shoulders.
good_when: You want a longer range and deeper stretch on the traps than a barbell allows.
You train at home or want a simple, joint-friendly trap movement.
bad_when: Grip fails before the traps on heavy sets (use straps or a barbell).
You want maximum absolute load, which a barbell shrug handles better.
